summary: ORCID + Semantic Scholar Author Verification and Paper Claiming MVP - All 13 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified: claim panel, ORCID callback route, authenticated/unauthenticated states.

issues: CSP warnings for Cloudflare beacon script - minor, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Test user with simulated ORCID already seeded in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: ORCID claiming feature fully tested. All endpoints working. ORCID OAuth flow cannot be tested end-to-end (no credentials configured) but error handling returns 503 correctly. Test user has simulated ORCID linked (0000-0002-1234-5678).

test_cases: Returns connected=true with ORCID details when logged in with ORCID linked
Returns empty claims array for unclaimed papers (public endpoint)
Returns 503 when ORCID not configured (no env vars)
Returns pending/verified when ORCID is connected and paper exists
Returns already_claimed when claiming same paper twice
Visible on paper page when user is logged in
Hidden when user is not logged in
Shows 'Link ORCID & Claim' button with ORCID icon
Handles missing authorization code with error message
Claim panel correctly positioned between header and abstract

mocked_api_note: ORCID OAuth flow cannot be tested end-to-end because ORCID_CLIENT_ID and ORCID_CLIENT_SECRET are NOT configured. The /api/claim/orcid/auth-url and /api/claim/orcid/connect endpoints correctly return 503 'ORCID integration not configured' error.
